items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次确认美国政府出口管制指令要求立即暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的全部访问。本条相较历史声明未新增技术细节，仍是合规与可访问性层面的区域禁用公告。对受影响地区调用方而言，这两款模型不可用，需切回 Claude Opus 4.8 或 Sonnet 5 等替代模型。
items.backend_focus: 确认业务流量是否涉及 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 model id，立即在 API 客户端把 model 字段替换为 claude-opus-4-8 或 claude-sonnet-5，并加 fallback；监控 429/403 错误码。

items.title: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most of
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  ten use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our inst...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 上线 Claude Science，面向科学家的可定制 AI 工作台，集成常用工具与软件包，输出可审计产物并提供弹性算力入口。这是一款面向科学家的产品/应用层发布，不直接暴露新模型 endpoint 或 SDK 字段给通用开发者。
items.backend_focus: 若团队做科研类 agent，可关注 Claude Science API 是否单独开放；在通用 API 上无字段需调整。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Announcements  Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级，主打更强编码、agentic 任务与专业工作表现。属于重大模型版本号变更，取代既有 Opus 4.x，但原文未明确给出 context window、max_tokens、Tool Use 行为差异。
items.backend_focus: 把生产环境 model 字段从 claude-opus-4.x 升级到 claude-opus-4-8，重点回归 coding 与 agent 长链路任务；关注 Anthropic deprecation 公告，旧 Opus 4.x 将按惯例进入弃用时间线。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的系列合作。属于区域市场扩张公告，未提及新增 region endpoint、模型在韩国的新可用性或定价 tier 变化。
items.backend_focus: 若业务覆盖韩国，留意后续是否有新的 ap-northeast region endpoint 或当地数据驻留公告；当前 SDK 无需变更。
